title: evolvulus pilosus
intro: Evolvulus pilosus, also known as Dwarf Blue Myrtle or Sweet Alyssum, is a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Evolvulus pilosus include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in traditional medicine, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
